_meta.note: conditions: `raw` verbatim from humulos; `parsed` best-effort. versions 1-5 + 'special' lines + evo_extra (fusion terminals + colosseum-only enemies). playable=false => colosseum opponent, not raisable.
_meta.sprite_gaps_note: all 5 are colosseum enemy-only; wayland-vpets carries only their X-Antibody forms (Murmukusmon absent). Fallback: DVPet roster has them — source enemy sprites there if needed.
